`),iframeDepths:Z}}function UL(_){let G0=Symbol("element");function U0(_){return _[G0]}function d_(_,Q){_[G0]=Q}function K0(_){let Q=(J)=>{for(let X of Array.from(J.querySelectorAll("*"))){_(X);let Q=_;Q;Q=Q.parentElement)if(Q.hasAttribute("inert"))return!0;return!1}function W0(_){if(_.tagName.toLowerCase()==="input"){let Q=(_.getAttribute("type")??"text").toLowerCase();if(["color","date","datetime-local","file","hidden","month","password","time","week"].includes(Q))return null}return A(_)}function s_(_,Q){let _.tagName.toLowerCase()==="iframe"}function i_(_){return _.flatMap((Q)=>{if(!(Q instanceof Element)||!z0(Q))return[Q];try{if(!Q.contentDocument)throw Z=u(L.split(/\s+/).map((G)=>_.ownerDocument.getElementById(G)?.textContent??"").join(" "));if(Z)J.push(Z)}return J}function y(_,Q){let J=(X)=>[...new Set(X)];switch(_.kind){case"css":return J(i_(Q).flatMap((X)=>s_(X,_.selector)));case"role":return X_(Q).filter((X)=>!b(X)&&!M0(X)&&W0(X)===_.role&&h(_.name,u(L_(X,!1)||l(X))));case"text":return J(i_(Q).flatMap((X)=>s_(X,_.selector).filter(z0)));case"within":return y(_.child,y(_.parent,Q));case"and":{let X=new Set(y(_.right,Q));return y(_.left,Q).filter((L)=>X.has(L))}case"or":return J([...y(_.left,Q),...y(_.right,Q)]);case"filter":return y(_.locator,Q).filter((X)=>{let L=l(X);if(_.hasText&&!h(_.hasText,L))return!1;if(_.hasNotText&&h(_.hasNotText,L))return!1;if(_.visible!==void X=y(_.locator,Q),L=_.index<0?X.length+_.index:_.index;return L>=0&&L<X.length?[X[L]]:[]}}}function WL(_){o();try{return y(_,[document])}finally{e()}}function zL(_){o();try{return{role:W0(_),name:u(L_(_,!1)||l(_)),hidden:b(_)||M0(_)}}finally{e()}}function FL(_,Q={}){K0((Z)=>{if(Z._ariaRef)delete Z._ariaRef});let J=_??document.body??document.documentElement,X={mode:"ai",depth:Q.depth,boxes:Q.boxes},L=Y0(J,X);return q0(L,X).text}function wL(_){let Q=null;return K0((J)=>{if(!Q&&J._ariaRef?.ref===_)Q=J}),Q}
